emails.subject: CA for Powder River Energy
emails.body: CA for Powder River Energy Attached is a draft CA. Let me know if you have any questions.

emails.subject: RE: CA for Powder River Energy
emails.body: RE: CA for Powder River Energy This looks great Gerald! Thanks. What next? Are you going to make official copies? Andrew To: Miles, Andrew

emails.subject: RE: CA for Powder River Energy
emails.body: We might want to forward this email version for their review first. I would think that their attorney's might have a few comments. To: Nemec, Gerald

emails.subject: RE: CA for Powder River Energy
emails.body: Sounds good I'll forward it to Clarence. Andrew To: Miles, Andrew
